chapter_title: Logical Alphabet and Number Sequence Test

solutions.solution:
(c) 118 : No prime digit
516 : One prime digit i.e., 5
935 : Two prime digits i.e., 3 and 5
453 : Two prime digits i.e., 3 and 5
620 : One prime digit i.e., 2
So, required numbers are 935 and 453

(d) According to the question,
Original numbers 8 1 3 2 6 1 4 5 8 7 3 2 6 9 4
New arrangement 3 1 8 1 6 2 6 5 4 2 3 7 4 9 6
Here, only number 237 is odd.
∴ Required number = 732

(c) According to the question,
Original number     813  261  458  732  694
New arrangement     138  126  458  237  469
                          3rd highest
∴ Required number = 458

(c) Highest number = 813
Second highest number = 732
∴ Required difference = (8 + 1 + 3) – (7 + 3 + 2) = 12 – 12 = 0

(b) According to the question,
Original numbers 8 1 3 2 6 1 4 5 8 7 3 2 6 9 4
New arrangement 8 3 1 2 1 6 4 8 5 7 2 3 6 4 9
                      Divisible by 5
∴ Required number = 458

(c) According to the question,
Original number 8 1 3 2 6 1 4 5 8 7 3 2 6 9 4
New arrangement 1 8 3 6 2 1 5 4 8 5 7 2 9 6 4
                      2nd smallest
∴ Required number = 732

(d) According to the question,
Original numbers 3 8 2 4 7 3 5 6 8
New arrangement 3 2 8 4 3 7 5 8 6
                      Third lowest

(b) According to the question,
Original numbers 7 2 8 8 4 7 6 2 9
New arrangement 7 8 2 8 7 4 6 9 2
∴ Required number = 568

(b) According to the question,
Original numbers 3 8 2 4 7 3 5 6 8 7 2 8
New arrangement 8 3 2 7 4 3 6 5 8 2 7 8
                      2nd highest
Original numbers 8 4 7 6 2 9
New arrangement 4 8 7 2 6 9
∴ Required number = 473

(b) According to the question,
Original numbers 3 8 2 4 7 3 5 6 8 7 2 8
New arrangement 2 9 3 3 8 4 8 7 5 8 3 7
Original numbers 8 4 7 6 2 9
New arrangement 7 5 8 9 3 6
(a) 847 + 629 ⇒756 + 936 = 1694
(b) 568 + 728 ⇒ 875 + 837 = 1712 ← Highest total
(c) 728 + 847 ⇒837 + 758 = 1595
(d) 568 + 847 ⇒875 + 758 = 1633
(e) 629 + 473 ⇒936 + 384 = 1320
So, required pair of numbers are 568 and 728.
